zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne於1058年12月出生在法國布格o-達迪喬時，他的父親Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne23歲，母親Sibylle de Barcelone23歲。他於1080年與Sybille de Bourgogne在法國布格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1082年住在法國布格且於1082年住在牙買加聖 詹姆斯莫特 霍布 迪斯特利可特法姆。他於1099年登記服兵役。他去世於1102年3月23日在土耳其阿達納希韓梅享年43歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne于1058年12月出生在法国布格o-達迪喬时，他的父亲Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne23岁，母亲Sibylle de Barcelone23岁。他于1080年与Sybille de Bourgogne在法国布格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1082年住在法国布格且于1082年住在牙买加聖 詹姆斯莫特 霍布 迪斯特利可特法姆。他于1099年登记服兵役。他去世于1102年3月23日在土耳其阿達納希韓梅享年43岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Rudež: nickname derived from rud ‘red, reddish’, or, alternatively, from rud ‘curly’ (standard Slovenian rod; compare Rodes ). In Croatia, the surname is also found in the form Rudeš.

variants.name: Rodes
meanings: Catalan (Rodés): habitational name from any of several places called Rodés, mainly those in El Pallars and El Conflent districts, in northern Catalonia.
Catalan: variant of Roda , from Catalan rodes, plural of roda ‘wheel’.
English: variant of   Rhodes  . Compare   Rhode  .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne was born in December 1058, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, his father, Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne, was 23 and his mother, Sibylle de Barcelone, was 23. He married Sybille de Bourgogne in 1080, in Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Burgundy, France in 1082 and Farm, Mount Horeb District, Saint James, Jamaica in 1082. He registered for military service in 1099. He died on 23 March 1102, in Mercin, Ceyhan, Adana, Türkiye, at the age of 43, and was buried in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne est né en décembre 1058, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sibylle de Barcelone, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sybille de Bourgogne en 1080, à Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Bourgogne, France en 1082 et à Farm, Mount Horeb District, Saint James, Jamaïque en 1082. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1099. Il est décédé le 23 mars 1102, à Mercin, Ceyhan, Adana, Turquie, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne im Dezember 1058 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne 23 und seine Mutter Sibylle de Barcelone 23. Er hat 1080 in Burgund, Frankreich Sybille de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1082 hat er in Burgund, Frankreich und 1082 in Farm, Mount Horeb District, Saint James, Jamaika gelebt. Er hat sich 1099 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 23. März 1102 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Mercin, Ceyhan, Adana, Türkei und wurde in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne è nato il nel dicembre 1058 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Sibylle de Barcelone, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Sybille de Bourgogne nel 1080, nel Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Bourgogne, Francia nel 1082 e nel Farm, Mount Horeb District, Saint James, Giamaica nel 1082. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1099. Morì il 23 marzo 1102, nel Mercin, Ceyhan, Adana, Turchia, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogneが1058年12月にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogneは23歳，母Sibylle de Barceloneは23歳であった。1080年にフランスボウルゴグンでSybille de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1082年にはフランスボウルゴグンに，1082年にはジャマイカサイント ジャムスモウント ホレブ ディストリクトファルムに住んでいた。彼は1099年に兵役登録をした。彼は1102年3月23日にトルコアダナセイハンメルシンで43歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルサイント-ニコラス-ルeス-クiテアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.Farm: 자마이카 세인트 자메스 모우트 호레브 디스트릭트 패
ko.lifeSummary: Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne(이)가 1058년 12월 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibylle de Barcelone(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1080년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 Sybille de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1082년도에 프랑스 부르고그니에서, 1082년도에 자마이카 세인트 자메스 모우트 호레브 디스트릭트 패에서 살았다. 그는 1099년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1102년 3월 23일 튀르키예 애던아 세이핸 머신에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 세인트-니콜라스-e스-ci테오스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne nasceu em dezembro de 1058, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sibylle de Barcelone, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybille de Bourgogne em 1080, em Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Bourgogne, França em 1082 e em Farm, Mount Horeb District, Saint James, Jamaica em 1082. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1099. Ele faleceu em 23 de março de 1102, em Mercin, Ceyhan, Adana, Turquia, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne родился декабрь 1058 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sibylle de Barcelone, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybille de Bourgogne в 1080 г. в местности бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности бургогн, Франция в 1082 году и в местности фарм, маунт хауреб дистрикт, сеинт джемесь, Ямайка в 1082 году. В 1099 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 23 марта 1102 г. в местности мирсин, кихань, адана, Турция в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-николас-лeс-кiтокс, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.
